speaker: GOWER
text: Here have you seen a mighty king

speaker: GOWER
text: His child, iwis, to incest bring;

speaker: GOWER
text: A better prince and benign lord

speaker: GOWER
text: That will prove awful both in deed and word.

speaker: GOWER
text: Be quiet, then, as men should be,

speaker: GOWER
text: Till he hath passed necessity.

speaker: GOWER
text: I’ll show you those in troubles reign,

speaker: GOWER
text: Losing a mite, a mountain gain.

speaker: GOWER
text: The good in conversation,

speaker: GOWER
text: To whom I give my benison,

speaker: GOWER
text: Is still at Tarsus, where each man

speaker: GOWER
text: Thinks all is Writ he speken can,

speaker: GOWER
text: And, to remember what he does,

speaker: GOWER
text: Build his statue to make him glorious.

speaker: GOWER
text: But tidings to the contrary

speaker: GOWER
text: Are brought your eyes. What need speak I?

speaker: GOWER
text: Good Helicane, that stayed at home—

speaker: GOWER
text: Not to eat honey like a drone

speaker: GOWER
text: From others’ labors, for though he strive

speaker: GOWER
text: To killen bad, keep good alive,

speaker: GOWER
text: And to fulfill his prince’ desire—

speaker: GOWER
text: Sends word of all that haps in Tyre:

speaker: GOWER
text: How Thaliard came full bent with sin,

speaker: GOWER
text: And had intent to murder him;

speaker: GOWER
text: And that in Tarsus was not best

speaker: GOWER
text: Longer for him to make his rest.

speaker: GOWER
text: He, doing so, put forth to seas,

speaker: GOWER
text: Where when men been there’s seldom ease;

speaker: GOWER
text: For now the wind begins to blow;

speaker: GOWER
text: Thunder above and deeps below

speaker: GOWER
text: Makes such unquiet that the ship

speaker: GOWER
text: Should house him safe is wracked and split,

speaker: GOWER
text: And he, good prince, having all lost,

speaker: GOWER
text: By waves from coast to coast is tossed.

speaker: GOWER
text: All perishen of man, of pelf,

speaker: GOWER
text: Ne aught escapend but himself;

speaker: GOWER
text: Till Fortune, tired with doing bad,

speaker: GOWER
text: Threw him ashore to give him glad.

speaker: GOWER
text: And here he comes. What shall be next,

speaker: GOWER
text: Pardon old Gower—this ’longs the text.
